scripts.release:pack: yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include '@chonky/*' npm pack
scripts.release:dry-run: yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include '@chonky/*' --topological npm publish --access public --dry-run
scripts.release:publish: yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include '@chonky/*' --topological npm publish --access public
